  "findings": [
    "Wrong gasket type/material identified for service conditions.",
    "Non-conformance with flange joint assembly procedures per ASME PCC-1.",
    "Potential for immediate joint failure, leakage, or catastrophic release of process fluid."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work immediately and isolate the joint/line if energized.",
    "Depressurize and drain the line if required by safe system of work.",
    "Verify correct gasket material per B16.5/PCC-1 for the service (P-T rating, chemical compatibility).",
    "Remove wrong gasket, inspect flange faces for damage, and reassemble with correct gasket using controlled bolting procedure."
  ],
  "rationale": "Installing a gasket of incorrect material for the service violates flange joint integrity requirements of ASME PCC-1 and B16.5. An in-service leak or blowout is a critical safety risk. Work must not proceed until the correct gasket is verified and installed.",
  "references": [
    "ASME PCC-1, Guidelines for Pressure Boundary Bolted Flange Joint Assembly",
    "ASME B16.5, Pipe Flanges and Flanged Fittings"
  ]
}
